genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 23 December 2025

species.citation: Lour. , Fl. Cochinch. (1790) 26 ; Taylor, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 8 (1977) 296; Li in Huang, Fl. Taiwan ed. 2 (1998) 719. = Utricularia flexuosa Vahl , Enum. Pl. (Vahl) 1 (1804) 198 ; Merr., Fl. Manila (1912) 432; Merrill, EPFP 3 (1923) 466.
species.distribution: Australia, Bangladesh, Borneo, Cambodia, China, India, Japan, Java, Korea, Laos, Lesser Sunda Isls, Malay Peninsula, Myanmar, Nepal, New Guinea, Pakistan, Philippines, Sri Lanka, Sulawesi, Sumatra, Taiwan, Thailand, Vietnam. LUZON: Cagayan, Ifugao, Laguna, MINDANAO: Lanao del Sur, MINDORO, PALAWAN.
species.notes: Luzon (Cagayan) to Palawan and Mindanao. Along shallow lake margins, sluggish streams, swamps, inundated rice paddies at low and medium elevation. Fl. Jan-Dec. 0-2700m.

species.citation: R.Br. , Prodr. Fl. Nov. Holland. (1810) 430 ; Taylor, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 8 (1977) 299.
species.distribution: Africa, Australia, Europe to China and Japan, India, Java, New Guinea, Philippines, Sri Lanka, Sumatra. LUZON: Benguet.
species.notes: High elevation pools, often not flowering. 1300-2500m.

species.citation: L. , Sp. Pl., 1st Ed. (1753) 18 ; Merr., Fl. Manila (1912) 433; Merrill, EPFP 3 (1923) 466; Li in Huang, Fl. Taiwan ed. 2 (1998) 721; Taylor, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 8 (1977) 281.
species.distribution: Australia, Bangladesh, Borneo, Cambodia, China, India, Japan, Java, Korea, Laos, Malay Peninsula, Myanmar, Nepal, New Guinea, Pacific Ocean, Philippines, Ryukyu Isls, Sri Lanka, Sulawesi, Sumatra, Taiwan, Thailand, Vietnam. CULION, LUZON: Benguet, Bulacan, NCR, Rizal, MINDANAO: Davao Oriental (photos).
species.notes: Swamps or marshes, sometimes in ricefields. 0-2000)m.

species.citation: L. , Sp. Pl., 1st Ed. (1753) 18 ; Taylor, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 8 (1977) 287. = Utricularia nivea Vahl , Enum. Pl. (Vahl) 1 (1804) 203 ; Merr., Fl. Manila (1912) 433; Merrill, EPFP 3 (1923) 466; Backer & Bakh.f., Fl. Java 2 (1965) 518.
species.distribution: Andaman Isls, Australia, Bangladesh, Borneo, Cambodia, China, India, Japan, Java, Korea, Laos, Madagascar, Malay Peninsula, Myanmar, Nepal, New Guinea, Pacific Ocean, Philippines, Ryukyu Isls, Sri Lanka, Sumatra, Taiwan, Thailand, Vietnam. GUIMARAS, LUZON: NCR.

species.citation: Edgew. , Proc. Linn. Soc. London 1 (1847) 351 ; Parnell, Thai For. Bull. (Bot.) 33 (2005) 120. = Utricularia baouleensis A.Chev. , Mém. Soc. Bot. France 8 (1912) 186 ; Taylor, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 8 (1977) 284. = Utricularia tenerrima Merr. , PJS 7c (1912) 247 ; Merr., Fl. Manila (1912) 433; Merrill, EPFP 3 (1923) 467.
species.distribution: Africa, China, India, Java, Madagascar, Philippines, Thailand. LUZON.

species.citation: L. , Sp. Pl., 1st Ed. (1753) 18 ; Parnell, Thai For. Bull. (Bot.) 33 (2005) 123. = Utricularia exoleta R.Br. , Prodr. Fl. Nov. Holland. (1810) 430 ; Merrill, EPFP 3 (1923) 466; Backer & Bakh.f., Fl. Java 2 (1965) 51x; Taylor, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 8 (1977) 294.
species.distribution: Africa, America, Australia, Bangladesh, Borneo, Caribbean, China, Europe, India, Indian Ocean, Japan, Java, Laos, Madagascar, Malay Peninsula, Middle East, Myanmar, Nepal, New Caledonia, New Guinea, Nicobar Isls, Pacific Ocean, Philippines, Sri Lanka, Sulawesi, Sumatra, Taiwan, Thailand, Vietnam. LUZON: Ilocos Sur (photos), Mountain Province, NCR.
species.notes: Shallow still water in lakes, swamps and marshes, usually at low elevation, Fl. Feb-Mar, Jul-Dec. (?-)800m (photos) to 1600(-2100)m.

species.citation: Benj. , Linnaea 20 (1847) 310 ; Merrill, EPFP 3 (1923) 466; Taylor, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 8 (1977) 283.
species.distribution: Philippines, Taiwan. LUZON: Albay, Benguet, Ilocos Norte, Tarlac (photos), Zambales, NEGROS (photos), PALAWAN, SIBUYAN.
species.notes: Lowlands to medium elevation, lithophytic in damp forests and along streams and creeks. Fl. Feb-May.

species.citation: Vahl , Enum. Pl. (Vahl) 1 (1804) 204 ; Taylor, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 8 (1977) 286.
species.distribution: Borneo, India to China and Japan, Indochina, Malay Peninsula, New Guinea, Philippines, Sumatra. LUZON: Zambales.

(1829) No. 1500, nom. inval., nom. nud.; Merrill, EPFP 3 (1923) 467. = Utricularia rosulata Benj. , Linnaea 20 (1847) 310 ; Merrill, EPFP 3 (1923) 467.

LEYTE, LUZON: Abra (photos), Albay, Apayao (photos), Aurora, Benguet (photos), Mountain Province, Nueva Vizcaya, Quezon, Rizal (photos), Zambales, MINDANAO: Bukidnon, Davao Oriental, Davao de Oro, Davao del Sur, Surigao del Norte, Zamboanga del Norte (photos), NEGROS, PALAWAN, PANAY, ROMBLON, SIBUYAN (photos).
